roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Client Reported to CCU and Paid in Full
Defendant is ordered to report to Collections Unit in Room 101, Hall of Justice, forthwith or within 48 hours of release from custody
Defendant to Report to the Adult Probation Department within 72 hours after sentencing.
Referral -  Referral for Presentence Report from Adult Probation Department
(Arbuckle Waiver) Right to be Sentenced by Judge who took the Plea or Verdict Waived
Defendant to Report to the Adult Probation Department
Adult Probation Department Presentence Report Request

Notice of Motion and Motion to Continue Preliminary Hearing

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 12-28-20 (60TH)/CTORD: COURT STATES CONDITIONS FOR DEFENDANT'S RELEASE FROM CUSTODY,  SEE FILED ORDER RE: IN DOCKET/OR/WS/CTORD: IF ASKED BY LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENTS, THE DEFENDANT MUST HAND OVER ANY ELECTRONIC DEVISES AND SUPPLYAPPRORIATE PASSWORDS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWF/
/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DEF: APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:DEFENDANT AND CONFLICT ATTORNEY ARE APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONT/X:DOP - ZOOM OK/
/CAL:FINAL TS OR DISPO/X:BOTH COUNSELS AND DEFENDANT ARE APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONT/DOP/X:ZOOM OK/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/DOP/
